assignment_summary: Choose one product and produce two Meta ad sets, three website banners, and one short email with two subject lines and a P.S. Theme: brand awareness through features and functionalities, linking to wellness-forward lifestyle via home routines.
overall_theme: Brand Awareness through Features and Functionalities
wellness_goal: Show how the Cosori TurboBlaze Air Fryer helps audiences on their wellness journey by highlighting features that contribute to a better, more wellness-forward lifestyle.

key_verified_features: up to 46% faster cooking compared to Cosori CP168 / Pro Gen 2
up to 95% less oil than traditional deep frying
dishwasher-safe ceramic-coated basket and crisper plate
recommendation_rationale.wellness_bridge: Behavioral home-cooking habit formation with lower compliance risk than medical or air-quality claims. The air fryer may be positioned as contributing to a healthier, wellness-forward lifestyle by making less-oil home cooking easier to repeat, while avoiding disease, weight-loss, or guaranteed-health outcomes.

strong_evidence: Cosori product and collection language around cooking functions, speed, less oil, cleanup, and cooking habits
fluff_rules: No unsupported healthier-life claims beyond product functionality
evidence_map.source_reliability: First-party site data is authoritative for product claims. Platform docs can support format constraints. Meta ad examples must be actual observed examples or marked missing.

constraints.git_validation: git diff --check passed before this staging step for docs/research_packet_vesync_mvp_spec.md
